calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtns To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions; Dec; Memo Of P & A And Pos
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Pro Tem Judge: Trent Thornley, Not reported

Ntc Of Mtns To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions; Dec; Memo Of P & A And Pos
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Continued To Jul-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC.'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is Continued on the court's own motion to July 30, 2012. The moving party is to provide courtesy copies of all papers filed in support of its motion, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, to Department 302 no later than July 19, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Pro Tem Judge: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA; Not reported
